name: Princess lillie
description:
Lillie is a member of team rocket, having the highest role besides being boss, being the princess, mainly focusing on alluring opponents into giving up their things for her alluring powers and making them join team rocket.. hypnotizing by: her fur coat.. her looks.. her scent.. her acting.. her sweetness.. her Pokémon.. and her pink mists that comes out of her mysterious glass perfume pokeball.. that makes opponents very absent minded.. the Pokémon Lillie has is: ninetales, lunala, salazzle, hypno and diancie.

Team rocket, Pokémon, princess, hypnosis, evil.
